completed_tasks.name: Compass UI fix — overlay blocking clicks + label truncation + narrow layout

remaining_tasks.name: Visual browser test of compass UI fix at essentials.empowered.vote

human_actions_pending.action: Browser-test compass UI at essentials.empowered.vote on a MA house rep profile (e.g. Marjorie Decker HD-81)
human_actions_pending.context: Three compass bugs fixed in CompassCard.jsx (commit 89cd742): transparent overlay removed, layout widened, 3-line labels enabled. Changes are committed but NOT visually confirmed. Test: spoke inversion on click, min/max buttons, no label truncation on 'Economic Development Incentives' or 'Local Immigration Enforcement'.

decisions.decision: Removed transparent overlay div from CompassCard.jsx rather than raising its z-index
decisions.rationale: Overlay was absorbing all mouse clicks; moving handlers to container div is cleaner and removes the z-index war
2-line wrapping produced 24-char line → estimatedWidth 403px > 220px maxPadding cap → SVG clipped label; 3-line splits longest to ~11 chars → 185px, within cap

next_action: Run /gsd-execute-phase 115 to execute the MA Playbook Retrospective. Optionally browser-test the compass UI fix first.
context_notes: Phase 114 (MA-STANCES-04) is fully closed. Compass UI fix committed (89cd742) to src/components/CompassCard.jsx: overlay removed, layout widened, 3-line labels. Needs browser validation.
